proofs.observation: Hybrid solar inverter INV-01 observed operating normally after being powered on. Battery power conversion system remained active for farm electrical supply.
Balcony environmental sensor recorded a temperature of 26.5°C and relative humidity of 70%.
Cloudy sky observed surrounding the farm with extensive cloud cover visible across the surrounding landscape.
Farm gate INF-GATE-0003 opened, providing access between HZ-02 and agricultural zones FZ-03, FZ-04, and FZ-05.
Duck house environmental sensor recorded an indoor temperature of 27.4°C, outdoor temperature of 27.4°C, and relative humidity of 77%. No ducks were present during the observation.
